title: Building Tweaks
description: Get ready to take your building projects to the next level and experience Minecraft in a new, smoother, and more beautiful way. Download the Building Tweaks modpack now, built upon the trusted foundation of Niceas Modpack.
body:
# Building Tweaks - The Ultimate Modpack for Builders and FPS Enthusiasts!
Experience Minecraft like never before with the **Building Tweaks** modpack! This specially curated modpack, built upon the foundation of **[Niceas Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/niceas)**, is designed for those who want to make their building projects more efficient and beautiful without compromising game performance. Here's what you can expect:

## 🛠️ Building Enhancements
Our modpack includes a hand-picked selection of mods that make building easier and open up new creative possibilities:

- **Building Gadgets**: Tools that help you construct large structures faster and more easily.
- **Effortless Building**: Enhanced building mechanics that make placing blocks more intuitive and quicker.
- **Architect**: A helpful tool to create blueprints of structures and easily replicate them.

## 🚀 FPS Boost
To ensure your game runs smoothly even with large and detailed building projects, we've included several mods that enhance your FPS:

- **Sodium**: A powerful renderer that drastically increases FPS.
- **Lithium**: Optimizes server and client performance to boost overall game performance.

## 🎨 Graphical Enhancements
In addition to performance mods, we have included graphical mods to ensure your game not only runs smoothly but also looks fantastic
